purpose: Store only approved affiliate URLs after partner acceptance. Do not paste speculative, scraped, or third-party affiliate links here.
rules: Only add a URL after Every Meal Guide is approved by the affiliate program or network.
Each URL needs brand, country, destination type, source network, approval date, and owner confirmation.
Placeholder /go/ routes remain local until approved URLs exist.
Run npm.cmd run affiliate:validate-approved before regenerating routes.
Run click QA after any URL swap.
